'''''Patrol XLS''''' was a [[Guardian-class patrol ship|''Guardian''-class patrol ship]] guarding the [[Emperor's Citadel]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}
